// note: Machine-readable structured registry of all swarm elements. See AGENTS.md (human-readable) and !/AGENTS.md (canonical narrative registry).

wakeup_protocol.historical_rule: Historical CrewAI harbor notes, abandoned branch artifacts, and exploratory scaffolds are non-live unless a live surface explicitly reactivates them.
wakeup_protocol.scope_note: Connector posture in this registry is local to IDAHO-VAULT. The broader LAF-US chamber and team topology lives in !/AGENTS.md and !/LAF-USB-FIVE-CORES-MIGRATION-2026-04-15.md.

agents.name: Gemini CLI
agents.role: narrative lens, political context, Sebald Code
agents.label: agent:gemini

agents.name: Antigravity CLI
agents.role: narrative lens, Sebald Code, Antigravity lineage
agents.label: agent:antigravity

agents.name: OpenAI Codex CLI
agents.title: The Lexicographer
agents.label: agent:codex
agents.notes: Codex auto-loads repo AGENTS.md instructions. Project-scoped Codex config lives in .codex/config.toml; .codex/CODEX.md is a repo-specific reference shim.

agents.name: Grok
agents.autoload_note: Manual injection - no confirmed xAI CLI dotfolder spec
agents.role: The Ironist - rapid reasoning, real-time web access

agents.name: DeepSeek
agents.role: The Analyst - deep reasoning, code analysis, research synthesis

agents.name: Perplexity
agents.role: The Scout - web search and research synthesis

agents.name: Linear Agent
agents.config: cloud - configured in Linear workspace settings
agents.role: Linear workspace AI - context synthesis, issue creation, status tracking
agents.notes: No local dotfolder. Access via Cmd+J, Slack, Teams, @mentions in Linear.

agents.name: Serena
agents.role: Semantic code intelligence — symbol navigation, codebase analysis, refactoring assistance
agents.notes: MCP server (github.com/oraios/serena). AWAKENED 2026-04-04 on local hardware. Cloud agents cannot reach — local-only. Accessible to local Claude Code (The Collared Cat) and any local MCP-capable agent.

agents.name: Mistral Vibe CLI
agents.autoload_note: Pending confirmation of official Mistral Vibe dotfolder spec — manual injection until confirmed

identity_contexts.personal: Logan's personal Microsoft account - Logan controls all settings
identity_contexts.institutional: Idaho Public Television M365 tenant - subject to IPT IT policy

ecosystems.name: Google ecosystem
ecosystems.note: Gemini CLI coding agent is separate - see .gemini/GEMINI.md

systems.name: GitHub
systems.role: Code hosting, PRs, Issues, GitHub Actions

systems.name: Linear
systems.github_sync: Bidirectional: PR lifecycle drives issue state (In Progress -> In Review -> Done). Branch naming or magic words (closes ENG-123) link PRs to issues.

systems.name: Slack
systems.role: Ephemeral coordination - breadcrumbs only. Not the record.
systems.rule: Durable decisions must be promoted to vault or Linear.

systems.name: Obsidian Sync
systems.role: Private courier for plugin settings and credentials across devices
systems.rule: Plugin data.json files are gitignored - never reach GitHub

connectors.name: GitHub
connectors.role: Primary execution and transport layer for issues, PRs, workflows, and automation output
connectors.auth_dependency: GitHub app connector in Codex session; repository auth and repo secrets for workflow-side automation
connectors.human_gate: Policy-changing, destructive, or governance-redefining writes remain Logan-gated.
connectors.promotion_rule: GitHub may carry execution state and automation output, but durable doctrine and long-lived context must be promoted into the vault; owner and status mirrors may be reflected into Linear when execution tracking is needed.
connectors.notes: Primary AFK paging route via GitHub Issues.

connectors.name: Linear
connectors.role: Owner, status, and planning layer for SWARM-tracked execution
connectors.auth_dependency: Linear connector in Codex session; LINEAR_API_KEY and webhook secrets for GitHub-side automation
connectors.human_gate: Live writes stay dry-run by default unless explicitly enabled; no meaningful work without a mapped issue.
connectors.promotion_rule: Linear tracks ownership, status, and planning; durable doctrine and recoverable context must be promoted back into the vault, and code-execution context may be mirrored to GitHub.
connectors.notes: Secondary AFK paging route; SWARM label is the active coordination hub.

connectors.name: Slack
connectors.role: Tertiary paging and conversational breadcrumb layer
connectors.auth_dependency: Slack connector in Codex session; SWARM_SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL for workflow notifications
connectors.human_gate: Decisions do not become durable until promoted into vault, GitHub, or Linear; urgent use is allowed but not self-authorizing.
connectors.promotion_rule: Use Slack for notifications, quick coordination, and breadcrumbs only; promote every durable outcome into the vault or execution systems promptly.
connectors.notes: Tertiary AFK paging route; not a system of record.

connectors.name: Gmail
connectors.human_gate: Any file write or durable use requires explicit query-time approval and sanitization of private content.
connectors.promotion_rule: Gmail may inform work, but actionable or durable outcomes must be promoted explicitly into the vault or execution systems.
connectors.notes: Source-sensitive communication lane; treat as ephemeral until promoted.

connectors.name: Google Calendar
connectors.role: Read-first scheduling and availability context lane
connectors.auth_dependency: Google Calendar connector in Codex session
connectors.human_gate: Any durable use requires explicit promotion; scheduling writes are out of scope for the v1 hub.
connectors.promotion_rule: Calendar context may inform triage or planning, but commitments must be captured in vault, GitHub, or Linear if they matter operationally.

connectors.name: Google Drive
connectors.role: Read-first document and evidence retrieval lane
connectors.auth_dependency: Google Drive connector in Codex session
connectors.human_gate: File writes require explicit approval; do not treat Drive as the operational record.
connectors.promotion_rule: Drive material may inform work, but durable notes, decisions, and execution context must be promoted into the vault or execution systems.
connectors.notes: Docs, Sheets, Slides, and Drive access remain adjunct in v1.

connectors.name: Box
connectors.role: Read-first external content and archival retrieval lane
connectors.human_gate: Explicit human approval is required before any durable extraction or cross-system write.
connectors.promotion_rule: Box content may be consulted or summarized, but anything durable must be promoted into the vault or execution systems.
connectors.notes: External repository of supporting materials; not wired into repo automation.

connectors.name: Cloudflare
connectors.role: Platform and deployment connector, not part of the v1 ops hub
connectors.authoritative_for: nothing in the current ops hub
connectors.auth_dependency: Cloudflare plugin skills are available in Codex; external account auth is required for live operations
connectors.human_gate: Any deploy, infrastructure, or platform write is Logan-gated and requires a separate activation plan.
connectors.promotion_rule: No automatic promotion; if Cloudflare outputs matter, capture them in vault, GitHub, or Linear explicitly.
connectors.notes: Deferred until a separate runtime and deployment plan exists.

connectors.name: Hugging Face
connectors.role: Research and remote compute connector, not part of the v1 ops hub
connectors.authoritative_for: nothing in the current ops hub
connectors.auth_dependency: Hugging Face plugin skills and connector access are available in Codex; external token and project auth are required for live operations
connectors.human_gate: Any job run, model publish, or remote write is Logan-gated and requires a separate activation plan.
connectors.promotion_rule: No automatic promotion; research findings or job outputs must be promoted explicitly if they become durable.
connectors.notes: Deferred until a separate research or compute workflow is approved.

control_plane.scope_note: GitHub, Linear, and Slack here describe the repo-local operating posture of IDAHO-VAULT, not the whole LAF-US world model.

template_tracking.policy: Concrete Obsidian template files named by tracked client config must be mirrored here and in manifest.json. Folder-only plugin scopes and private plugin settings must be declared explicitly instead of guessed.

folder_bindings.note: Tracked config exposes a template pool, not concrete template file bindings.

untracked_plugins.note: Plugin settings are intentionally private via Obsidian Sync and are not read into swarm tracking.

plugin_layer.// note: Machine-readable registration of the Obsidian plugin layer. Live doctrine, topology, and promotion rules live in !/PLUGIN-REGISTRY.md.
plugin_layer.authority_boundary: swarm.json registers the plugin layer; live plugin doctrine, topology, dependency declarations, and promotion rules live in !/PLUGIN-REGISTRY.md.
plugin_layer.promotion_gate: No plugin-state change counts as legitimate until !/PLUGIN-REGISTRY.md is updated.

cross_swarm_sync.// note: Machine-readable registration of the vault-native cross-swarm signaling bus. Protocol lives in !/SIGNALS/README.md.
cross_swarm_sync.authority_boundary: swarm.json registers the signaling bus; the live protocol lives in !/SIGNALS/README.md; execution state remains in GitHub and Linear; the Courtroom DOCKET is the live visibility surface.

entrypoints.role: live board for signal visibility and active coordination

runtime_rules: Any agent may write a signal file.
Recipients check OPEN signals at session start.
Replies are new files, not body edits.
No secrets belong in signal files.
cross_swarm_sync.promotion_gate: Signals may coordinate work, but durable decisions and execution commitments must still be promoted into the vault, GitHub, or Linear explicitly.

crews.// note: CrewAI is an active layer under re-foundation. swarm.json registers the layer but does not carry CrewAI crew, task, or runner topology.
crews.authority_boundary: swarm.json registers the layer; live CrewAI topology and promotion rules live in .crewai/MANIFEST.md.
crews.principle: Portable authority over local runtime romance

protocols.name: LEVELSET
protocols.flag: STEP-0 and STEP-1 in active development
